raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The CalFresh Fruit and Vegetable EBT Pilot Project made healthy food more affordable for low-income families.",
    "Assemblymember Alex Lee is requesting $63 million in funding to double the program’s reach.",
    "The CalFresh Fruit and Vegetable EBT Pilot provided up to $60 each month in nutrition incentives.",
    "CalFresh recipients received $1 back on their EBT card for every $1 spent on fresh fruits and vegetables.",
    "The CalFresh Fruit and Vegetable EBT Pilot served over 88,500 households and provided $7.3 million in rebates within just three months.",
    "The additional $63 million in funding would expand the CalFresh Fruit and Vegetable EBT Pilot to serve an estimated 111,000 households monthly.",
    "One in five families in California experienced food insecurity in September 2024.",
    "About one in seven households across the U.S. were food insecure during 2023.",
    "The additional CalFresh benefits give families greater flexibility in their food choices, which is essential for combating food insecurity."
  ]
}
```
